Usage: heyfood ask [OPTIONS] QUERY...

 Ask the HelloFood conversational agent.

╭─ Arguments ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ *    query      QUERY...  Natural-language request. [required]                                                       │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
╭─ Options ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│ --lat                      FLOAT  Latitude for restaurant/location-aware requests.                                   │
│ --lng                      FLOAT  Longitude for restaurant/location-aware requests.                                  │
│ --near                     TEXT   Place name for this request.                                                       │
│ --no-location                     Do not send saved location context.                                                │
│ --conversation-id          TEXT   Continue an existing conversation.                                                 │
│ --continue         -c             Continue the last CLI conversation.                                                │
│ --for                      TEXT   One-turn household scope: member name/id, me, or everyone.                         │
│ --json                            Print stable JSON.                                                                 │
│ --raw                             Deprecated alias for --json.                                                       │
│ --help                            Show this message and exit.                                                        │
╰──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────╯
